heading: Add IP Access List Entries
body:
Atlas CLI

To create an IP access list for your project using the
Atlas CLI, run the following command:

```sh

atlas accessLists create [entry] [options]

```

To learn more about the command syntax and parameters, see the
Atlas CLI documentation for [atlas accessLists create](atlas/cli/current/command/atlas-accessLists-create).

Atlas Administration API

Atlas UI
